cards.title: Should Kids Climb Over Neighbor's Fence for Ball?
cards.body: A parent debate: does retrieving a ball over the fence teach trespassing? One parent worries about the lesson, while the other sees harmless play.

cards.title: Dutch Walking Festival Boosts Child Happiness
cards.body: Once yearly, Dutch kids walk for four nights exploring neighborhoods with parents and teachers. The tradition is genuinely transformative for exercise, friendship, and wellbeing.

cards.title: Only Children Aren't Weird—But Prejudices Persist
cards.body: Being an only child doesn't make you selfish or lonely despite cultural stereotypes. Parents choosing one child face unnecessary judgment about their parenting.

cards.title: Should You Start a Pension for Your Baby?
cards.body: Parents are encouraged to open self-invested personal pensions for kids. But the advice raises real questions about family finances and retirement priorities.

cards.title: Partner's Cruel Mother Worries Future Children Safety
cards.body: A woman seeks advice about her partner's abusive mother ahead of having kids. The recommendation: minimize contact unless she changes radically.

cards.title: Debunk Reading Myths for Child Development
cards.body: Parents want to support literacy but often don't know what works. Research debunks five common myths about reading and child development.

cards.title: Combat Screen Time With a Summer Play Diet
cards.body: Kids glued to screens need a "play diet" of social, physical, and creative activities. Balance technology use with essential summer play.

cards.title: Build Kids' Empathy Through Perspective-Taking
cards.body: Summer offers perfect opportunities to strengthen children's social skills and empathy. Simple everyday conversations help kids develop perspective-taking abilities.

cards.title: Teach Right and Wrong Without Religion
cards.body: Teaching ethical choice-making to children doesn't require religious affiliation. It's simpler than most parents think to build moral foundations.

cards.title: Navigate Modern Fatherhood With New Roles
cards.body: Fatherhood is evolving as roles shift. Dads, moms, and couples can navigate these changes with better communication, compassion, and partnership.

cards.title: Grandfatherhood Brings Unexpected Gifts
cards.body: Grandfathers experience deeper perspective, gratitude, and family appreciation than in their fatherhood years. This life stage offers unique emotional rewards.

cards.title: Five Tips to Keep Kids Cool This Weekend
cards.body: Children are especially vulnerable to heat as temperatures rise. These tips help protect your kids during hot summer weather.
